title: Vegapunk’s Future Island
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Bonney, Franky, Unknown person #11, Dorry, Unknown person #12 as Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.
scene: Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: True enough. Still, I wonder which one...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...of tyrant Kuma's crimes earned him his life sentence.

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Daddy was no stinkin' tyrant!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And he hated the government! He'd never submit to them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: AYAH!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They must've forced him to accept the procedures somehow!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: A BEAM SABER?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That's awesome!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We must be in a scrapyard for vegapunk's junk.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: This still works though.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He may call himself a scientist, but to me he's just a murderer!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dad always used to say he was part of a very special race...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But so what?! him being different doesn't justify forcin' him to be a lab rat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Click

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And it sure as hell doesn't justify Killin' him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: 'You said it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: A special race?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: The thousand sunny

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Woooa AAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We're flying!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The robot's soaring through the air!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Naturally, this is vega force 01 after all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Allows it to easily sustain this propulsion.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Anti-Grav-?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The island Aircon is also needed to ensure a suitable climate. One day, this will be possible anywhere!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: There're giant monsters down there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It's like some kind of futuristic city!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Precisely! The world of tomorrow is built here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is egghead, the island of the future!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The research stratum is right above the clouds,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the fabrication stratum is just below us. Our manufacturers and research assistants reside there.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hear your captain is down there causing a hullabaloo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: As long as he's all right...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Aren't you two coming?

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: ZORO? Brook?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Woah! It's just like the solid clouds from Sky Island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Nah, I'll watch the ship.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: This really takes me back!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's my first time! O what the heck is this?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seeing as we can control the island's atmosphere and all...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can naturally make use of pyrobloin to coagulate and alter the density of water vapor...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thus recreating the island and sea clouds you usually find on Sky Islands!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the entrance to the main lab!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Wow! It's so flashy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do make sure to change into some appropriate attire before entering!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can get a costume from the dressing transformation room there!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When you try on a pair of Dom shoes,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Don't forget to use the lever.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: They can adjust to fit...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: No matter your foot size!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Looks & heavy...

summary: This part advances the Egghead / Vegapunk Truth through 51 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
